name: argos-tools
description: Codex skills for the local argos CLI, exposed as $argos-xxx commands.

interface.shortDescription: Use local argos reviews, critiques, vision, SOTA research, config, and gates from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Argos Tools exposes the local argos CLI through Codex skills named argos-review, argos-critique, argos-plan, argos-vision, argos-sota, argos-config, argos-doctor, and argos-gate. The SOTA skill supports normal/deep research profiles, with normal as the default, and writes summary.json with source health and quality buckets. The plugin is a lightweight Codex facade; argos itself never launches Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run $argos-doctor to check argos/plugin readiness before using external argos.
Run $argos-review on this implementation plan with relevant files.
Run $argos-critique on this diff and classify blockers vs improvements.
Run $argos-sota to research the latest source-backed state of a domain.
